title: poa secunda var. elongata
intro: Poa secunda var. elongata, also known as Blue Grama Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa secunda var. elongata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although it is essential to note that the efficacy and safety of these preparations may vary.
